text: Hi, my name is Megan and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance. And we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? Nanya. Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80? Nanya.
